title: Sarcoglottis diaphana
taxonomy: Sarcoglottis diaphana is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics, such as its flowers and leaves, which are typical of orchids. The genus Sarcoglottis is a group of terrestrial orchids native to Central and South America. Sarcoglottis diaphana is a species within this genus, and its classification is further supported by molecular studies. The classification of Sarcoglottis diaphana helps us understand its evolutionary relationships with other orchid species.
uses: Sarcoglottis diaphana, a species of orchid, has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its purported health benefits.
